# Java Testing Standards

## Framework
- JUnit 5 for unit tests
- Mockito for mocking
- JaCoCo for coverage (threshold >= 80%)
- AssertJ or Hamcrest for fluent assertions

## Test Structure
- Given-When-Then or Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
- Test class per production class: `FooTest` for `Foo`
- Use `@Nested` classes to group related test scenarios

## Naming
- Method names: `shouldDoSomething_whenCondition()` or `givenX_whenY_thenZ()`
- Be descriptive — test names are documentation

## Coverage Discipline
- Test all happy paths and failure paths
- Use `@ParameterizedTest` for multiple input scenarios
- Validate with PIT mutation testing (mutation score >= 80%)
- Integration tests use Testcontainers for external dependencies
